_comment: Audi (Belgium) finance inputs. Two ways to reach the D'Ieteren CCF finance form (formsccf.audi.be):  (1) `models` — durable configurator entry points. Each `configuratorUrl` carries a `pr=` PR-code string identifying a specific build; the browser fetcher opens it, accepts cookies, clicks 'Bereken uw maandprijs' and follows the redirect to formsccf, which mints a FRESH finance `code`. This survives code expiry.  (2) `codes` — already-minted CCF codes for the direct-HTTP fast path (formulastep?code=...). These EXPIRE (server-side saved quotes), so a dead code is expected to redirect to /ccf/nl/Base/Oops and is skipped with a logged reason. Add more models by copying a configurator URL from www.audi.be after building a car.

codes.note: Example A3 finance code from the task. Likely expired — kept as a regression/smoke input for the direct-HTTP path.
